response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified dialogue from 00:00-01:29 followed by a vocal song.
2. Detected the song title "ダーリンダンス" (Darling Dance) and artist "かいりきベア" (Kairiki Bear) in the on-screen text at 01:30.
3. Identified the performer as Kureiji Ollie.
4. Performed web search: "Darling Dance" Kairiki Bear Japanese and English lyrics.
5. Extracted and formatted the lyrics from the search results.
6. Mapped scenes based on the song start timestamp.
response.global_summary: The video features a dialogue intro followed by a full vocal performance of the song "Darling Dance" by Kairiki Bear, performed by the virtual idol Kureiji Ollie.

scenes.description: Dialogue sequence featuring the character Kureiji Ollie on a smartphone screen.
Full performance of "Darling Dance" by Kureiji Ollie, with on-screen lyrics and the song title displayed.
